entry.title: New: Bill 55 (Hawaiʻi County) — Adopted
entry.content:
AMENDS ORDINANCE NO. 24-32, AS AMENDED, THE OPERATING BUDGET FOR THE COUNTY OF HAWAIʻI FOR THE FISCAL YEAR ENDING JUNE 30, 2025

Appropriates revenues in the Federal Grants – HOME-American Rescue Plan Program account ($1,977,568)

Latest action: Council: Bill 55 passes second & final reading - 06/18/25

View on the council site
